new_opportunities.name: BNB Hack: AI Trading Agent Edition
tracks: Autonomous Trading Agents ($24,000, 5 winners) — CMC + Trust Wallet + BNB AI Agent SDK

new_opportunities.eligibility: Solo or teams, 18+, at least one sponsor capability required

new_opportunities.action: Register on DoraHacks, evaluate if BNB Agent SDK can be adapted for trading agent submission

new_opportunities.name: UiPath AgentHack 2026
tracks: 3 tracks (UiPath Maestro, Agent Builder, Test Cloud)
new_opportunities.tech: UiPath Platform, Maestro, Agent Builder, Test Cloud, UiPath for Coding Agents
new_opportunities.eligibility: Open to all — developers, automation engineers, data scientists, students
new_opportunities.barriers: Requires UiPath platform access (hackathon tenant provided)
new_opportunities.fit_reason: Enterprise agentic automation — different focus than our crypto/DeFi stack. Would require learning UiPath platform. Good prize pool but platform lock-in is a concern. HITL judging criteria aligns with our Agent Shield work conceptually.
new_opportunities.action: LOW PRIORITY — Enterprise platform, not our core stack. Consider only if bandwidth opens.

new_opportunities.name: Band of Agents Hackathon
tracks: Enterprise AI agent workflows — agents communicate, coordinate, exchange context
new_opportunities.fit_reason: Agent coordination is our core competency. Multi-agent workflows align with our stack. Prize TBA is a concern — lablab.ai hackathons historically have modest prizes. Short timeline (1 week).
new_opportunities.action: Monitor — check prize pool when announced. Short timeline makes this risky.
